prompt_latex: For what value of $a$ is $f(x)=\begin{cases}2x - 6,&x<-3\\1x+a,&x\ge -3\end{cases}$ continuous at $x=-3$?
solution_latex: Continuity requires the two formulas to agree at $x=-3$: $-12=-3+a$, so $a=-9$.
